member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseBinaryChild
member.summary: Decoded child summary from FastParse binary MessagePack output.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryChild.Rule
member.summary: Child grammar rule when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryChild.Text
member.summary: Child source bytes when requested.

member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseBinaryDocument
member.summary: Decoded FastParse binary MessagePack document.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryDocument.Format
member.summary: Binary format marker, currently tsmp-binary.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryDocument.SchemaVersion
member.summary: Binary schema version.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryDocument.Language
member.summary: Language grammar used by the native parser.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryDocument.Nodes
member.summary: Decoded AST nodes included in the binary payload.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryDocument.NodeCount
member.summary: Total node count reported by the native parser.

member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode
member.summary: Decoded AST node from FastParse binary MessagePack output.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.Id
member.summary: Node id when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.ParentId
member.summary: Parent node id when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.Rule
member.summary: Tree-sitter grammar rule name when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.Text
member.summary: Original source bytes for the node when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.StartLine
member.summary: Start line when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.StartColumn
member.summary: Start column when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.EndLine
member.summary: End line when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.EndColumn
member.summary: End column when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.StartByte
member.summary: Start byte offset when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.EndByte
member.summary: End byte offset when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.ChildCount
member.summary: Child count when requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseBinaryNode.Children
member.summary: Child summaries when requested.

member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseClient
member.summary: Managed C# client for the native FastParse C ABI.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseClient.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the native FastParse library.
member.param: Optional explicit path to libfastparse.dylib, libfastparse.so, or fastparse.dll. Normal NuGet use does not require this parameter.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseClient.LibraryPath
member.summary: Path or library name used to load the native FastParse library.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseClient.Version
member.summary: Native FastParse C API version string.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseClient.ParseBytes(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},FastParse.ParseOptions)
member.summary: Parses source bytes and copies output bytes into managed memory.
member.param: Source code bytes.
Parse options. Defaults to full JSON AST output.
member.returns: A full parse result containing output bytes.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseClient.ParseBytesSummary(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},FastParse.ParseOptions)
member.summary: Parses source bytes and returns counts/lengths without copying output bytes.
member.param: Source code bytes.
Parse options. Defaults to full JSON AST output.
member.returns: A summary result without output bytes.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseClient.ParseText(System.String,FastParse.ParseOptions,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Encodes source text and parses it.
member.param: Source code text.
Parse options. Defaults to full JSON AST output.
Encoding used to convert text to bytes. Defaults to UTF-8.
member.returns: A full parse result containing output bytes.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseClient.ParseTextSummary(System.String,FastParse.ParseOptions,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Encodes source text and returns counts/lengths without copying output bytes.
member.param: Source code text.
Parse options. Defaults to full JSON AST output.
Encoding used to convert text to bytes. Defaults to UTF-8.
member.returns: A summary result without output bytes.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseClient.Dispose
member.summary: Frees the loaded native library handle.

member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseException
member.summary: Exception thrown when the native FastParse call fails.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseException.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a native parse exception.
member.param: Status returned by the exported C function.
Status stored in the native result.
Native error detail.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseException.Status
member.summary: Status returned by the exported C function.

member.name: P:FastParse.FastParseException.NativeStatus
member.summary: Status stored in the native result.

member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseField
member.summary: Field flags that control which AST fields FastParse includes in the output.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.DefaultAll
member.summary: Use the native default field set.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.Id
member.summary: Include the node id.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.ParentId
member.summary: Include the parent node id.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.Rule
member.summary: Include the Tree-sitter grammar rule name.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.Text
member.summary: Include the original source bytes/text for the node.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.Range
member.summary: Include start/end line and column positions.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.ByteRange
member.summary: Include start/end byte offsets.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.ChildCount
member.summary: Include the number of child nodes.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.Children
member.summary: Include child rule/text summaries when supported by the output format.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseField.All
member.summary: Request all supported fields.

member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseFormat
member.summary: Output format produced by the native FastParse parser.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseFormat.Json
member.summary: Structured JSON AST output.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseFormat.Csv
member.summary: Flat CSV rows for tabular pipelines.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseFormat.Stats
member.summary: Count nodes without copying output bytes.

member.name: F:FastParse.FastParseFormat.Binary
member.summary: Binary MessagePack AST output.

member.name: T:FastParse.FastParseMessagePack
member.summary: Minimal decoder for FastParse binary MessagePack output.

member.name: M:FastParse.FastParseMessagePack.Decode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Decodes FastParse binary MessagePack output into schema-specific C# objects.
member.param: MessagePack payload returned by .

member.name: T:FastParse.ParseOptions
member.summary: Options passed to a FastParse parse call.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseOptions.Language
member.summary: Language grammar to use. The current preview package supports java.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseOptions.Format
member.summary: Output format to produce.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseOptions.IncludeRules
member.summary: Optional pipe-delimited Tree-sitter rule names to include, for example class_declaration|method_declaration. Leave null or empty to include the full AST.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseOptions.Fields
member.summary: Field flags to include in output. uses the native default.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseOptions.IncludeTokens
member.summary: Whether token nodes should be included when supported by the native parser.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseOptions.Pretty
member.summary: Whether JSON output should be pretty-printed.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseOptions.JsonAll
member.summary: Default JSON parse options that return the exploratory AST output.

member.name: T:FastParse.ParseResult
member.summary: Full parse result with output bytes copied into managed memory.

member.name: M:FastParse.ParseResult.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.UInt64,FastParse.FastParseFormat)
member.summary: Creates a parse result from native output bytes.
member.param: Output bytes copied from native memory.
Number of nodes matched by the parse options.
Output format used for .

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseResult.Data
member.summary: Output bytes copied from native memory.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseResult.NodeCount
member.summary: Number of nodes matched by the parse options.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseResult.Format
member.summary: Output format used for .

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseResult.Text
member.summary: Interprets as UTF-8 text.

member.name: M:FastParse.ParseResult.JsonDocument
member.summary: Parses as a JSON document.
member.returns: A JSON document owned by the caller.

member.name: T:FastParse.ParseSummary
member.summary: Summary parse result that avoids copying native output bytes.

member.name: M:FastParse.ParseSummary.#ctor(System.UInt64,System.UInt64,FastParse.FastParseFormat)
member.summary: Creates a summary result.
member.param: Number of bytes the native parser produced.
Number of nodes matched by the parse options.
Output format requested.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseSummary.OutputLength
member.summary: Number of bytes the native parser produced.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseSummary.NodeCount
member.summary: Number of nodes matched by the parse options.

member.name: P:FastParse.ParseSummary.Format
member.summary: Output format requested.
